response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows platform (only mentions C/C++ in LabWindows/CVI, which is not standard C++ for capital markets systems) and has no domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets. While they have strong general software engineering skills, they do not meet the core technical or domain requirements for the role.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with diverse language and tool expertise
Experience with low-latency applications and high-performance databases
Proven ability to lead and contribute to complex technical projects
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Minimal exposure to SQL Server/Oracle (only mentions SQL and MongoDB)

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income
